A Real Pain (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,344,978Details
International Box Office $16,511,049
Worldwide Box Office $24,856,027
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mismatched cousins David and Benji reunite for a tour through Poland to honor their beloved grandmother. The adventure takes a turn when the odd-couple’s old tensions resurface against the backdrop of their family history.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$228,856 (2.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.74 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,185 max. theaters, 3.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $8,786,177

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 1st, 2024 (Limited) by Searchlight Pictures
November 15th, 2024 (Expands Wide) by Searchlight Pictures
International Releases: November 8th, 2024 (Wide), released as Prawdziwy ból (Poland)
December 26th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
December 26th, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
January 3rd, 2025 (Limited) (Finland)
January 8th, 2025 (Limited) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: December 31st, 2024 by Searchlight Pictures
MPA Rating: R for language throughout and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2834 (cert #54868), 5/15/2024)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Award win: BAFTA Best Original Screenplay Winner
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself, Screenplay Written By the Star
Film festival: Sundance Film Festival 2024
Filming location (city or town): New York, NY

Production Method:Live Action

Mismatched cousins David and Benji reunite for a tour through Poland to honor their beloved grandmother. The adventure takes a turn when the odd-couple’s old tensions resurface against the backdrop of their family history.
